startLocation.name: The Old Tavern
startLocation.description: A dimly lit tavern at the crossroads. The perfect place to gather information and plan your next move. The smell of ale and roasted meat fills the air.

locations.name: Dark Cave
locations.description: A deep cave carved into the mountain side. Strange sounds echo from within. Only the brave dare enter its depths.

locations.name: Ancient Forest
locations.description: A forest older than memory itself. The trees whisper secrets of ages long forgotten. Many who enter never find their way out.

locations.name: Castle Gate
locations.description: The imposing gates of the fortress loom before you. Two guards stand watch, their eyes scanning the horizon for threats.

actions.name: Talk to Barkeep
actions.description: The barkeep has been here for decades and knows every rumour in the region. Perhaps he has information about the dark fortress to the north.

actions.name: Search for Clues
actions.description: Inspect the notice board by the entrance. Travellers often pin bounties, warnings, and cryptic messages that might aid your quest.

actions.name: Rest & Recover
actions.description: Rent a room for the night and recover your strength. Rest restores Life and Energy but consumes Coins and Food.

actions.name: Trade with Merchant
actions.description: A travelling merchant has set up in the corner. He carries rare potions and supplies that could prove invaluable on your journey.
